description: Alert thresholds for plywood market sensitivity re-analysis triggers

brent_crude.rationale: Every $5 Brent move shifts Indonesian freight cost ~$45–60/TEU and resin cost ~2–3% COGS

baltic_dry_index.rationale: 10% BDI move translates to ~8–12% TEU rate change on transpacific routes

eu_gas_price.rationale: €8/MWh move shifts electricity cost for German/Italian mills by ~$12–18/m³

fx_rates.rationale: 5% FX move alters the effective USD-denominated cost for exporting country mills

watch_events: Indonesia export log ban modification or enforcement change
Canada wildfire emergency affecting BC timber supply
EU forestry regulation (Nature Restoration Law) implementation milestone
New US ADD/CVD petition filed against any target country (HS 4412)
Section 232 investigation on wood products initiated
Section 301 action expanded to cover plywood from new countries
USMCA/CUSMA renegotiation affecting Canadian lumber/wood products
EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) extended to wood products
Panama Canal drought restriction (draft limits) >7 days
Suez Canal closure or diversion notice
Strait of Malacca security incident or rerouting advisory
Strait of Hormuz escalation affecting bunker fuel supply

full_swarm_rerun.notes: Align with quarterly log price and electricity tariff data releases
